item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Education Oct 2015 - Jul 2019 > Ph.D. in theoretical physics (summa cum laude) Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research, Germany Humboldt-University Berlin, Germany Sep 2013 - May 2015 > M.Sc. in physics (honors) FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany University College London, United Kingdom Oct 2010 - Sep 2013 > B.Sc. in physics FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany Experience since Apr 2021 > Research Scientist Bethge Lab, Tuebingen AI Center, University of Tuebingen, Germany

item.title: Events
item.description: 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 | 2015 | 2014 Upcoming Dutch Institute for Emergent Phenomena, Amsterdam, Netherlands, Oct 28, 2021 Collective Learning Dynamics (Virtual Talk) Past Events 2021 Gymnasium Rutesheim, Rutesheim, Germany, Oct 22, 2021 Introduction to cooperative AI (Lecture) Petrov Lab, University of Konstanz, Oct 6-7, 2021 Collective Learning Dynamics (Talk) Fu Lab, Dartmouth College, Hanover, United States, Oct 14, 2021 Evolutionary Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Dynamics (Virtual Talk)

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 Preprints Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning Dynamics with Irreducible Environmental Uncertainty Barfuss W, Mann RP (in review) preprint Taxonomies for structuring models for World-Earth system analysis of the Anthropocene: subsystems, their interactions and social-ecological feedback loops Donges JF, Lucht W, Cornell SE, Heitzig J, Barfuss W, Lade SJ, Schlüter M (in press) Earth System Dynamics Discussions doi Peer-reviewed 2021 Dynamical systems as a level of cognitive analysis of multi-agent learning - Algorithmic foundations of temporal-difference learning dynamics Barfuss W (2021) Neural Computing & Applications doi | code | zenodo
